case_title: MELISSA MARIE ESTRADA VS. BRICK & TIMBER, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) EEKUAHIWIOLANIKUAKA'A KAHAPEA, MANAGER OF COMMUNICATIONS. FILED BY DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY ESTRADA, MELISSA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMBER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, MELISSA MARIE AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMBER, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE] SERVED NOV-02-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMBER, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, MELISSA MARIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMBER, INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SECURITY DEPOSIT REFUND STATUTES LAW. AMOUNT AWARDED PER CC 1950.5. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF MELISSA MARIE ESTRADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRICK & TIMER, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EEKUAHIWIOLANIKUAKA'A KAHAPEA, MANAGER OF COMMUNICATION. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISTING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESTRADA, MELISSA MARIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-20-2022 - JUDGMENT.
